label: BEARISH
tldr: The US-Iran peace deal has deflated the war-risk oil premium that drove energy stocks to multi-year highs; XLE's technicals have broken down (MAs crossed bearishly, MACD negative) and a 3-6 week swing trade favors avoiding crude-levered E&Ps while rotating to fee-based midstream names like WMB as a relative safe haven.

label: BEARISH
tldr: Energy is in a near-term technical correction as WTI crude dropped 33% from its May peak on US-Iran peace talks and supply recovery, breaking XLE below its 50-day MA — but oversold conditions and deal-collapse risk create asymmetric bounce setups in DVN, XOM, and EOG.
